content: {"question":"How do the documented health benefits and risks of intermittent fasting vary across socioeconomic strata, and what evidence exists on its feasibility and safety when implemented through federal nutrition assistance programs like SNAP and WIC?","search_queries":["intermittent fasting health outcomes socioeconomic disparities systematic review","intermittent fasting food insecurity low-income populations RCT","time-restricted eating SNAP WIC implementation feasibility","intermittent fasting shift workers metabolic health cohort study","chrononutrition disparities health equity population-level intervention"],"perspective":"Public_Health"}
